input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.1.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.1.1.1
            TITLE: the assigned vehicle number must appear on the vehicle as follows:

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.1.1.1: The assigned vehicle number must appear on the vehicle as follows:
VE.1.1.1 The assigned vehicle number must appear on the vehicle as follows:  
a. Locations: in three places, on the front of the chassis and both sides 
b. Height: 150 mm minimum 
c. Font:  Block numbers (sans serif characters without italic, outline, shadow, or cursive 
numbers)  
d. Stroke Width and Spacing between numbers:  18 mm minimum 
e. Color:  White numbers on a black background OR black numbers on a white background 
f. Background: round, oval, square or rectangular 
g. Spacing: 25 mm minimum between the edge of the numbers and the edge of the 
background 
h. The numbers must not be obscured by parts of the vehicle

final_answer: rule VE.1.1.1: The assigned vehicle number must appear on the vehicle as follows: VE.1.1.1 The assigned vehicle number must appear on the vehicle as follows: a. Locations: in three places, on the front of the chassis and both sides b. Height: 150 mm minimum c. Font: Block numbers (sans serif characters without italic, outline, shadow, or cursive numbers) d. Stroke Width and Spacing between numbers: 18 mm minimum e. Color: White numbers on a black background OR black numbers on a white background f. Background: round, oval, square or rectangular g. Spacing: 25 mm minimum between the edge of the numbers and the edge of the background h. The numbers must not be obscured by parts of the vehicle
